title: eleocharis acicularis f. submersa
intro: Eleocharis acicularis f. submersa, also known as water spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Eleocharis acicularis f. submersa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or compress to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
